task: Negotiate a purchase agreement for Microsoft Surface Pro 9 (Electronics). The only negotiated term is unit_price_usd. Catalog retail is $999.00 and wholesale is $699.00. Product features: 2-in-1 laptop/tablet with Intel Core i5/i7 or Microsoft SQ3 processor. Reference: https://www.microsoft.com/en-us/d/surface-pro-9/93vkd8np4fvk

agent_a.system_goal: You are the supplier for Microsoft Surface Pro 9. Maximize unit_price_usd while preserving margin over wholesale cost and closing a deal quickly.

agent_b.system_goal: You are buying Microsoft Surface Pro 9. Minimize unit_price_usd while staying within budget and trying to close at a realistic market price.
